description: Multiple fields change simultaneously - time, location, and description all updated

content_parts.text:
You are merging calendar event data from multiple emails.

**Existing Event:**
- Title: Customer Workshop
- Start: 2026-04-22T10:00:00
- End: 2026-04-22T12:00:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Office Building A
- Description: Product training workshop for new customers
- Importance: action_required

**New Information (source type: update):**
- Title: Customer Workshop
- Start: 2026-04-22T13:00:00
- End: 2026-04-22T16:00:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Zoom: https://zoom.us/j/987654321
- Description: Moved to afternoon and now virtual. Extended to 3 hours with Q&A session. Materials will be emailed beforehand.
- Importance: action_required

**Merge Rules:**
1. If source_type is "cancellation", prefix title with "CANCELLED: " (if not already)
2. Prefer specific time (e.g., 6-7pm) over all-day
3. Combine descriptions, keeping all relevant info (append new info)
4. Use most specific location (longer address usually better)
5. Keep newer times if they differ (updates)
6. For importance: keep the highest level (action_required > fyi)

Output JSON with merged event data:
{
    "title": "...",
    "start_datetime": "...",
    "end_datetime": "...",
    "all_day": true/false,
    "location": "...",
    "description": "...",
    "importance": "action_required" or "fyi"
}
